title: Akinetic field
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''akinetic field''' was produced by [[Voorson]] [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]] and used to keep [[Deepdock/Legends|deepdock]] modules together. They were used in [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive's]] [[R/M Facility Number Four]].

{{Tech-stub}}

*<!-- 1989-10-XX -->''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''
